R

regAgentAdmin(IRegUserInfo) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Creates a central server administrator or changes the parameters of an existing one.
regAssignmentRule(UUID, UUID, IAssignmentRuleInfo, int) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Creates an assignment rule, changes an existing one, or moves an existing rule to a new position.
regCluster(IClusterInfo) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Creates a cluster or changes the state of an existing one.
regClusterAdmin(UUID, IRegUserInfo) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Creates a cluster administrator or changes the parameters of an existing one.
regResourceConsumptionCounter(UUID, IResourceConsumptionCounter) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Creates or updates a resource counter.
regResourceConsumptionLimit(UUID, IResourceConsumptionLimit) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Creates or updates a resource limit.

Cluster administrator description

regWorkingServer(UUID, IWorkingServerInfo) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Creates a working server or changes the description of an existing one.

Description of a resource counter of a 1C:Enterprise cluster
